name: maze_escape
creator: wperez274
description:
Escape the random maze forest and try to avoid touching the electric walls ( energy will decrease ). The goal is to reach the right side of the screen (exit).

Keys:

key [Navigate/Arrows] = Move, (UP, DOWN, LEFT, RIGHT, DIAGONAL) key [OK] = Slow Motion key [Backspace] = Pause / Resume

Good luck!

Sincerely,

Wilson
